name: auth: passwords replaced by magic links

loser.title: Auth uses shared passwords
loser.rationale: legacy shared login from the pilot

winner.title: Auth uses magic links, no passwords
winner.rationale: password reset tickets were a third of support volume

answer: magic links hold; the password pilot is over

name: sessions: 24 hour lifetime replaced by 8 hours

winner.title: Sessions expire after 8 hours with idle lock

answer: 8 hours with idle lock, decided after the audit

name: billing: second payment adapter replaced by stripe only
topic: which payment provider do we use

winner.title: Billing must use Stripe only
winner.rationale: two adapters doubled the dunning bugs

answer: stripe only; the paddle experiment is retired

name: retention: hard delete replaced by a 30 day soft delete

winner.title: Deleted projects are recoverable for 30 days, then purged
winner.rationale: a hard delete cost the team a week

answer: soft delete for 30 days won; storage cost was noise
